languages.text: {n}Он встряхивает головой, будто бы отгоняя наваждение.{/n} "Это неважно. Пусть ваши намерения и были благородны, защитники моего дворца пали от вашей руки. Этому не может быть оправдания".

traits.locale_text: "Но нет и не может быть оправдания гибели защитников дворца, сколь бы низкородными те не были, от вашей руки. Тем более, коль вам нечем возместить их потерю".

languages.text: {n}He shakes his head as if to ward off some hallucination.{/n} "It does not matter. Though your intentions may have been honourable, the defenders of my palace fell by your hand. There can be no excuse for that."
languages.original_text: {n}Он встряхивает головой, будто бы отгоняя наваждение.{/n} "Это неважно. Пусть ваши намерения и были благородны, защитники моего дворца пали от вашей руки. Этому не может быть оправдания".

traits.locale_text: {n}He shakes his head as if to ward off some hallucination.{/n} "It does not matter. Though your intentions may have been honourable, the defenders of my palace fell by your hand. There can be no excuse for that."

{n}He shakes his head as if to ward off some hallucination.{/n} "It does not matter. Though your intentions may have been honourable, the defenders of my palace fell by your hand. There can be no excuse for that."

{n}He shakes his head as if to ward off some hallucination.{/n} "It does not matter. Though your intentions may have been honourable, the defenders of my palace fell by your hand. There can be no excuse for that."

languages.text: {n}他摇了摇头，仿佛要驱散什么幻觉。{/n}“不重要了。纵然你是出于好意，可我宫殿的守卫终究是命丧你手。这无可饶恕。”
languages.original_text: {n}He shakes his head as if to ward off some hallucination.{/n} "It does not matter. Though your intentions may have been honourable, the defenders of my palace fell by your hand. There can be no excuse for that."

traits.locale_text: {n}他摇了摇头，仿佛要驱散什么幻觉。{/n}“不重要了。纵然你是出于好意，可我宫殿的守卫终究是命丧你手。这无可饶恕。”

languages.text: {n}Il secoue la tête comme pour dissiper quelque hallucination.{/n} « Peu importe. Si honorables qu'aient été vos intentions, les défenseurs de mon palais n'en sont pas moins tombés sous vos coups. Et cela, rien ne saurait l'excuser. »
languages.original_text: {n}He shakes his head as if to ward off some hallucination.{/n} "It does not matter. Though your intentions may have been honourable, the defenders of my palace fell by your hand. There can be no excuse for that."

traits.locale_text: {n}Il secoue la tête comme pour dissiper quelque hallucination.{/n} « Peu importe. Si honorables qu'aient été vos intentions, les défenseurs de mon palais n'en sont pas moins tombés sous vos coups. Et cela, rien ne saurait l'excuser. »

languages.text: {n}Sanki bir halüsinasyonu defetmek istermiş gibi başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Bunun bir önemi yok. Onurlu niyetlerle huzuruma gelmiş olsanız bile sarayımın savunucuları sizin elinizde can verdi. Bunun hiçbir mazereti olamaz."
languages.original_text: {n}He shakes his head as if to ward off some hallucination.{/n} "It does not matter. Though your intentions may have been honourable, the defenders of my palace fell by your hand. There can be no excuse for that."

traits.locale_text: {n}Sanki bir halüsinasyonu defetmek istermiş gibi başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Bunun bir önemi yok. Onurlu niyetlerle huzuruma gelmiş olsanız bile sarayımın savunucuları sizin elinizde can verdi. Bunun hiçbir mazereti olamaz."

languages.text: {n}Niega con la cabeza, como si buscara sacudirse alguna alucinación.{/n} «No importa. Aunque sus intenciones hayan sido honorables, los defensores de mi palacio han muerto a sus manos. No hay excusa para eso».
languages.original_text: {n}He shakes his head as if to ward off some hallucination.{/n} "It does not matter. Though your intentions may have been honourable, the defenders of my palace fell by your hand. There can be no excuse for that."

traits.locale_text: {n}Niega con la cabeza, como si buscara sacudirse alguna alucinación.{/n} «No importa. Aunque sus intenciones hayan sido honorables, los defensores de mi palacio han muerto a sus manos. No hay excusa para eso».

languages.text: {n}Er schüttelt den Kopf, als wolle er sich von einer Halluzination befreien.{/n} "Das spielt keine Rolle. Obschon Eure Absichten ehrenwert sein mögen, sind die Verteidiger meines Palastes durch Eure Hand gefallen. Dafür gibt es keine Entschuldigung."
languages.original_text: {n}He shakes his head as if to ward off some hallucination.{/n} "It does not matter. Though your intentions may have been honourable, the defenders of my palace fell by your hand. There can be no excuse for that."

traits.locale_text: {n}Er schüttelt den Kopf, als wolle er sich von einer Halluzination befreien.{/n} "Das spielt keine Rolle. Obschon Eure Absichten ehrenwert sein mögen, sind die Verteidiger meines Palastes durch Eure Hand gefallen. Dafür gibt es keine Entschuldigung."

languages.text: {n}幻覚を払いのけるように、彼は首を振った。{/n}「それはどうでもいい。あなたの意図は高潔だったとしても、私の宮殿を守る者はあなたの手に落ちた。それは許されない。」
languages.original_text: {n}He shakes his head as if to ward off some hallucination.{/n} "It does not matter. Though your intentions may have been honourable, the defenders of my palace fell by your hand. There can be no excuse for that."

traits.locale_text: {n}幻覚を払いのけるように、彼は首を振った。{/n}「それはどうでもいい。あなたの意図は高潔だったとしても、私の宮殿を守る者はあなたの手に落ちた。それは許されない。」
